creator: fritz.heinrichmeyer@fernuni-hagen.de
text:
Hello,

we moved the harddisks to an identical SMP-box. Now i wait since 5 days
for my spontaneous reboots at the new box.

After changing CPUs at the suspected box, one time only one was
recognized ...

--
